title.en: LIGHTING DEVICES OR SYSTEMS THEREOF, BEING PORTABLE OR SPECIALLY ADAPTED FOR TRANSPORTATION
Systems of electric lighting devices (systems employing both electric and non-electric light sources or exchangeable light sources F21L27/00)
Electric lighting devices with self-contained electric batteries or cells
{the device being a pocket lamp (F21L4/022, F21L4/045, F21L4/085 take precedence)}
characterised by the provision of two or more light sources
characterised by the provision of a light source housing portion adjustably fixed to the remainder of the device
with the light source coupled to the remainder of the device solely by cable
characterised by means for in situ recharging of the batteries or cells
Electric lighting devices with built-in electric generators (with solar cells F21L4/00)
with fluid drive
with mechanical drive, e.g. spring
Electric lighting devices without a self-contained power source, e.g. for mains connection
capable of hand-held use, e.g. inspection lamps
carried on wheeled supports
Non-electric torches; Non-electric flares
Lanterns, e.g. hurricane lamps or candle lamps
{Fastening or lifting of the lamp glass (fastening of component parts of lighting devices F21V17/00)}
{Special adaptation for protection against draughts (in lighting devices employing combustion other than lanterns F21V37/02)}
Non-electric pocket lamps, e.g. lamps producing sparks
Non-electric hand-lamps for miners
Non-electric portable lighting devices, or systems thereof, not provided for in groups F21L17/00 - F21L23/00

Lighting devices or systems, employing combinations of electric and non-electric light sources; Replacing or exchanging electric light sources with non-electric light sources or vice versa in lighting devices or systems
